item.title: Homepage
item.dc:creator: chrish
item.content:encoded:
The Growth Platform for CPG Founders

Forget the noisy founder Slacks and equity-grabbing accelerators.

🔥 We fast track your growth through personalized coaching and connections that drive success.

Apply Now →

Founders & Operators of

Not 1,000 Members. Just the Right Ones.

Small by design. Big on results. Every operator gets personalized coaching, curated peer circles, and real relationships that actually drive progress.

Personal Care Brand

From $500K → $15M in under a year.

Hot Beverage Brand

From winding down the business → Award-winning rebrand.

Supplement Brand

From limited retail → National Walmart rollout.

Supplement Brand

From $0 paid media → $30K/month & profitable in 3 months.


And We Don’t Take Equity.

How Our Coaching Works


1:1 Expert Coaching

Get direct guidance from operators who’ve scaled real CPG brands. Bring your toughest challenge—whether retail, supply chain, or ads—and get answers from someone who’s done it before.

Biweekly Growth Circles

6–8 CPG founders from non-competing brands, carefully matched and guided by a facilitator. A space to pressure-test ideas, swap lessons, and push your business forward.

Peer Matching

Skip the awkward networking. We connect you with founders at your stage who can share what’s working (and what isn’t) in real time.

Private Community

A vetted circle of ambitious CPG builders. Tap into quick advice, trusted vendor recs, or just founders who get the grind.

+30 yrs

CPG experience

|

+300M

CPG Customers

|

+500

Employees hired

|

+$100M

Funding raised

Memberships

Community

$29

/

month

Like-minded founders, expert insights, and exclusive resources that get your CPG brand in gear.

No revenue requirements

Apply Now

As a Community member, you’ll get:

  • Private community access with vetted CPG founders
  • Peer-to-peer DMs (no noise, no spam)
  • Access to resource library
  • Expert fireside chat recordings
  • Monthly Live Office Hours

Most Popular

Growth

Starting at $249

/

month

Bi-weekly peer roundtables. Live expert firesides. Real connection, camaraderie, and coaching to accelerate your personal and professional growth.

For 6-7 figure brands

Apply Now

Everything in Community, plus:

  • Bi-weekly 90min facilitated small groups with founders at a similar stage, facilitated by a seasoned CPG coach.
  • Interactive fireside chats with experienced operators
  • Ongoing Office Hours with the CPG Fast Track team
  • Structured cadence to keep you accountable
  • Risk-free 90-day guarantee

Partner

Starting at $595

/

month

Custom engagement built specifically for your business. Our most hands-on track. Exclusively for founders we deeply believe in. Limited seats.

For 7-8 figure brands

Apply Now

Everything in Growth, plus:

  • Customized approach tailored for founders’ needs
  • 1:1 coaching with CPG Fast Track founders
  • Additional seat for co-founder
  • On-demand access for high-leverage decisions
  • Strategic support across growth, finance, and execution

Meet Your Coaches

You'll get to know your coaches like you would an executive coach - and they'll get to know you. Plus, this is just the tip of the spear.

Lisa Barnett

Co-Founder, Frmr President & CMO, Little Spoon

Specialties: Strategy, Marketing, Branding, Team

Accolades: Inc 5000 Awardee, Women Changing the Food Industry by Well + Good, Time's Best Invention of the Year, CircleUp Most Innovative Consumer and Retail Brand, Forbes 30 Under 30 Venture Capital.

Dave Colina

Founder & CEO, O2 Hydration

Specialties: Leadership, Sales, Partnerships, Marketing

Accolades: Inc 5000 Awardee, a certified CrossFit coach & Krav Maga black belt, and winner of the 2020 Best Beverage Marketing Campaign of the Year.

Markus Karjalainen

Frmr CMO, Founding team, Four Sigmatic

Specialties: Ecommerce, Brand Marketing

Accolades: DTC-first marketer, widely recognized as pioneering adaptogens in the United States, including top-selling coffee products on Amazon.

Meet Your Facilitators

Jason Feifer

Editor in Chief, Entrepreneur Magazine; Author, Speaker, Podcaster

Specialties: Media, Storytelling, Personal branding

Accolades: Previous editor at Fast Company and Men's Health, author of book "Build for Tomorrow", keynote speaker, LinkedIn "Top Voice in Entrepreneurship"

Matt Gartland

Co-founder & CEO, SPI Media; Community Expert, and Startup Advisor

Specialties: Leadership, Strategy, Community, Finance, Team

Accolades: Former Fortune 50 executive track leader; serial entrepreneur; C-suite startup experience in DTC e-comm, SaaS, and the Creator Economy

PRODUCTS SOLD IN

Fast-track With Us

Scaling omnichannel sales

Fundraising for every stage

Affordable market research 

Go-to-market positioning

Hiring and recruiting 

Brand and
packaging design

And many more...

Are We A Strong Fit?

This is an active, highly-vetted network of CPG leaders building the next generation of global brands by combining the power of community, insights, and access.

Apply Today

Beyond proof of product, but haven't yet scaled into multiple millions

Founder, co-founder, or majority owner

Under ~10 employees

Premium "better for you" products currently in the market

Focus on growth and route to profitability

Apply Today

Get 3 Most-Watched CPG FastTrack Sessions — Free

Then, 3 actionable ideas. Once a week.

item.title: Membership
item.dc:creator: MarkusK
item.content:encoded:
From Curated Community To 1:1 Coaching

Expert Coaching

From founders a few years ahead of you to help you make the right decisions and avoid the wrong ones.

Seasoned Network

Of groups, we’ve had success with ourselves, ranging from growth agencies to production partners and everything in between.

Curated Community

Of founders just like you to workshop ideas and celebrate your victories.

Endless Opportunities

Over time, we'll start to help you connect the dots even faster, accelerating your road to victory.

+30 yrs

CPG experience

|

+10M

CPG Customers

|

+500

Employees hired

|

+$100M

Funding raised

Membership Options

Community

Access your CPG peers

$199 / month

Join Now
  • Private network of peers and pros
  • Active conversations on hot topics
  • Weekly accountability experience
  • Special events with industry experts
  • On-demand library of tactical workshops
  • Toolkit of proven templates and resources
  • Exclusive perks from partners

Mastermind

Grow with mastermind groups

$399 / month

Apply Now

Everything in Community, plus:

  • Monthly tactical SWARM activities
  • Peer-led mastermind groups
  • Bi-Weekly Office Hours w/ CPGFT team
  • 1:1s with resident expert partners

Coaching

Fast track with 1:1 Coaching

$799 / month

Join Waitlist

item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: chrish
item.content:encoded:
The CPG Network That’s Got Your Back

Don't figure it out alone. That's slow and risky. Our CPG private network helps you make smarter decisions faster. No BS. Just actionable support at every step.

🔥 Now Accepting Applications

Apply to Join Us
Book Free Consultation

Founders & Operators of


Get Unstuck. Increase Velocity. Keep Momentum.

Chasing your first million? Scaled past it? Members in our private network have already achieved that level of success. Together, we can help you get there, too.

Join our private network of founders, pros, and experts who’ve been there, done that. —and are here to help you move faster, smarter, and with way less guesswork.

We Are Your Extended C-Suite

Expert Coaching

Make smarter decisions with guidance from founders who’ve already been where you’re going.

Trusted Connections

Trusted intros to partners, vendors, and agencies we’ve actually used to scale real CPG brands.

Private Network

Collaborate, troubleshoot, and grow alongside founders who get what you’re building.

Strategic Momentum

From first hire to fundraising to scaling sales, we help you connect the dots at every stage.

+30 yrs

CPG experience

|

+300M

CPG Customers

|

+500

Employees hired

|

+$100M

Funding raised

How It's Done

Focused Small Groups

Bi-weekly cohort sessions designed to tackle your real-time challenges—no fluff, just solutions with fellow founders walking the same path.

Built-In Founder Network

You’ll be surrounded by a vetted crew of early-stage CPG founders. Bonus: member perks like $10K+ in annual services.

Expert Access, On Demand

From 1:1s with in-house pros across brand, growth, retail, and ops, to monthly industry masterminds with leaders from industry-shaping CPG companies like Olipop, Liquid Death, and Goli.

Strategy in Action

Each quarter, we roll up our sleeves with hands-on planning exercises so you walk away with real decisions made—not just ideas

item.title: Pricing
item.dc:creator: MarkusK
item.content:encoded:
Pick Your Growth Path

Community

$29

/

month

Like-minded founders, expert insights, and exclusive resources that get your CPG brand in gear.

No revenue requirements

Apply Now

As a Community member, you’ll get:

  • Private community access with vetted CPG founders
  • Peer-to-peer DMs (no noise, no spam)
  • Access to resource library
  • Expert fireside chat recordings
  • Monthly Live Office Hours

Most Popular

Growth

Starting at $249

/

month

Bi-weekly peer roundtables. Live expert firesides. Real connection, camaraderie, and coaching to accelerate your personal and professional growth.

For 6-7 figure brands

Apply Now

Everything in Community, plus:

  • Bi-weekly 90min facilitated small groups with founders at a similar stage, facilitated by a seasoned CPG coach.
  • Interactive fireside chats with experienced operators
  • Ongoing Office Hours with the CPG Fast Track team
  • Structured cadence to keep you accountable
  • Risk-free 90-day guarantee

Partner

Starting at $595

/

month

Custom engagement built specifically for your business. Our most hands-on track. Exclusively for founders we deeply believe in. Limited seats.

For 7-8 figure brands

Apply Now

Everything in Growth, plus:

  • Customized approach tailored for founders’ needs
  • 1:1 coaching with CPG Fast Track founders
  • Additional seat for co-founder
  • On-demand access for high-leverage decisions
  • Strategic support across growth, finance, and execution

FAQ

Q. What do I get as a member?

It depends on how much support you’re looking for. All members get access to our private community of vetted CPG founders, monthly live sessions, and an ever-growing library of tactical resources.

If you join the Growth tier, you’ll also get small group coaching, direct access to our founder team, and live tactical trainings.

For those who want deeper, personalized support, our Partner tier includes 1:1 coaching, on-demand access to experts, and an invite to our in-person mastermind retreat.

Each tier is designed to match how hands-on you want us to be in helping you grow.

Q. How does Growth Circle coaching work? How are groups assigned?

After you join, we’ll schedule a short onboarding interview to understand where you are in your journey, what your main sales channels are, and where you need the most support. Based on that, we’ll place you into a Growth Circle with founders at a similar stage and with complementary challenges.

Each group meets bi-weekly with a CPG Fast Track coach and is designed to give you tactical support, accountability, and founder-to-founder connection that’s actually useful.

The goal is to surround you with people who get what you’re building — and push you to keep growing.

Q. Am I a good fit? Who is the community for?

CPG Fast Track is for emerging CPG founders building premium, better-for-you brands. Most members are:

• Past the proof-of-concept stage, but not yet scaled into multiple millions

• Founders, co-founders, or majority owners

• Leading lean teams (usually under 10 employees)

• Actively selling products in-market

• Focused on growth and a clear path to profitability

We’re a highly-vetted, operator-only network — designed to support early-stage brand builders serious about scaling.

Q. What happens after I apply?

Once you apply, you’ll be invited to a short membership interview. This helps us get to know you better—your brand, growth goals, and where you’re hoping to get support.

Depending on the tier you chose, we’ll use the interview to make sure you’re a great fit for the community and, if applicable, place you in the right small group or coaching track. It’s a two-way conversation to ensure CPG Fast Track is the right next step for where you are now.

Get 3 Hours of CPG Founder Trainings — Free.

Then, 3 actionable ideas. Once a week.

item.title: CPG Professionals
item.dc:creator: MarkusK
item.content:encoded:
The Growth Platform for CPG 

Forget noisy industry groups and generic professional networks.

CPG Fast Track helps you grow faster through curated peer groups, practical coaching, and real relationships that lead to better decisions and results.

Apply Now →

Founders & Operators of

Not 1,000 Members. Just the Right Ones.

Small by design. Big on results. Every member gets access to a high-quality peer community, thoughtful guidance, and real conversations with people who understand the realities of CPG.

Increase Velocities

A sales lead ramping velocities in Whole Foods

Optimize Packaging

A brand marketer navigating a packaging redesign

Win in Retail

An executive scaling her brand in Walmart

Improve ROAS

An ecomm leader scaling ad spend across Meta and Google

Structure Better Deals

An attorney working through copacking and partnership agreements

Manage Complexity

An operations executive managing international supply chain challenges

How CPG Fast Track Works


Expert Guidance

Get input on your toughest challenges from seasoned CPG operators who have been there, done that.

Biweekly Peer Groups

Join a curated peer circle of 8-12 other CPG professionals from non-competing brands to help you workshop real challenges and pressure-test ideas.

Smart Peer Matching

Skip awkward networking and get connected with the right people based on your role, goals, and experience so you can build relationships that are actually useful.

Private Community

Stay connected in a vetted, members-only space where you can ask questions, share ideas, get recommendations, and solve problems in real time.

+30 yrs

CPG experience

|

+300M

CPG Customers

|

+500

Employees hired

|

+$100M

Funding raised

What You Get

Facilitated peer groups

Get placed into a curated small group of CPG professionals who are at your level and in the trenches with you. These aren’t passive masterminds — they’re tight, high-signal groups designed for real accountability, honest feedback, and faster decision-making.

Vetted community

CPG Fast Track is a vetted network of CPG operators who show up to help each other win. No fluff, no lurking — just other people like you sharing what’s working, what’s not, and how to move faster.

Interactive fireside chats


Live sessions with experienced founders and operators. Ask questions, go deep, and get practical insights you can apply immediately.

Memberships

Growth

Starting at $249

/

month

Biweekly peer roundtables, expert-led conversations, and hands-on support.

Best for professionals at scaling brands.

Apply Now
  • Biweekly 90-minute facilitated peer groups
  • Interactive fireside chats with operators and specialists
  • Private community access with vetted CPG professionals
  • Structured accountability
  • Risk-free 90-day guarantee

Coaching

Starting at $595

/

month

A custom engagement designed for senior leaders and teams.

Best for those who want deeper feedback on key business decisions.

Apply Now

Everything in Growth, plus:

  • 1:1 coaching with CPG Fast Track leadership
  • On-demand support for high-leverage decisions
  • Strategic guidance across growth, operations, team, and execution

item.title: Sponsors
item.dc:creator: MarkusK
item.content:encoded:
Sponsors

Partnering with the best in CPG

Pilothouse

Pilothouse specializes in digital marketing for direct-to-consumer brands, offering services like media buying, creative production, and conversion rate optimization. Their data-driven approach drives significant revenue growth, making them a reliable partner for ambitious marketers.

Learn More

Cozen O'Connor

Cozen O'Connor is a global full-service law firm providing expert legal counsel in diverse practice areas. Their experienced attorneys offer strategic solutions to complex legal issues, particularly in insurance, real estate, and corporate law, ensuring favorable client outcomes.

Learn More

Ware2Go

Ware2Go offers flexible warehousing and fulfillment solutions, optimizing supply chains and enhancing delivery speeds. Their platform provides on-demand warehousing, integrated shipping, and real-time inventory management to improve customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

Learn More

item.title: Terms of Service
item.dc:creator: matt
item.content:encoded:
CPGX, LLC d/b/a CPG Fast Track

Effective Date: January 1, 2026

These Terms of Service (“Terms”) govern your access to and use of the CPG Fast Track website, community, content, and services (collectively, the “Services”). Please read them carefully.

By accessing or using the Services, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not access or use the Services.

1. Who We Are

CPG Fast Track is operated by CPGX, LLC, doing business as CPG Fast Track (“CPG Fast Track,” “we,” “us,” or “our”). We provide an online, subscription-based membership designed to support early-stage founders building consumer packaged goods (CPG) businesses through education, resources, group coaching, and community.

2. Eligibility & Accounts

You must be at least 18 years old and able to form a legally binding contract to use the Services.

To access the membership, you must create an account and provide accurate, current information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account.

If you believe your account has been accessed without authorization, contact us immediately at hello@cpgfasttrack.com.

3. Platform Hosting (Circle)

The CPG Fast Track community is hosted on a third-party platform operated by Circle.

By using the Services, you acknowledge that:

  • Platform availability, features, moderation tools, and performance may be affected by Circle or other third-party providers
  • We are not responsible for outages, downtime, or technical failures outside our reasonable control
  • Circle’s own Terms and Privacy Policy apply in parallel to your use of the community

4. Membership, Billing & Renewals

Subscription Plans

CPG Fast Track memberships are offered on a monthly, quarterly, or annual subscription basis.

Automatic Renewal

Your subscription automatically renews at the end of each billing period unless you cancel before renewal. By subscribing, you authorize us to charge your payment method for recurring fees.

Price Changes

We may change subscription pricing from time to time. Price increases may apply to existing members upon renewal, with advance notice. Price changes will not affect your current billing period.

Cancellation

You may cancel at any time through your account settings or by contacting hello@cpgfasttrack.com. Cancellation takes effect at the end of your current paid period. We do not provide prorated refunds for unused time.

5. Refund Policy

We offer a 90-day refund window from the start of your membership.

Refunds during this window require good-faith participation in the membership and a reasonable attempt to resolve concerns with our team. If we are unable to resolve your issue, you may request a full refund.

No refunds are provided under any circumstances after the 90-day refund window.

6. Nature of the Services & No Guarantees

CPG Fast Track provides:

  • General educational content
  • Tactical, implementation-oriented guidance
  • Group coaching, including live calls, workshops, and office hours
  • Templates, frameworks, and community discussion

What We Do Not Provide

CPG Fast Track does not provide:

  • Legal advice
  • Financial or investment advice
  • Regulatory or compliance advice (including FDA, labeling, or claims compliance)

You are solely responsible for your business decisions, implementation, and results.

No Guarantees

Results vary. We make no guarantees regarding revenue, growth, funding, retail placement, or business success. Any examples or case studies are illustrative only and not promises of outcomes.

7. Community Conduct & Commercial Activity

We aim to maintain a supportive, professional community.

Allowed

  • Sharing your own CPG brand in context
  • Asking for feedback on products, packaging, pricing, or strategy
  • Direct messaging other members if they have DMs enabled

Prohibited

  • Selling or pitching products or services to other members
  • Unsolicited promotional activity
  • Spam, harassment, or deceptive conduct

We reserve the right to enforce these rules in our discretion to protect the integrity of the community.

8. User Content & Intellectual Property

Your Content

You retain full ownership of any ideas, business information, or intellectual property you share in the community.

By posting content, you grant us a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, display, and distribute that content solely in connection with operating and improving the Services.

Confidentiality Expectations

Participation in the community does not waive ownership of your intellectual property. However, we cannot guarantee how other members may use information you choose to share.

9. Recordings & Member Experiences

Some live sessions may be recorded; others may not.

We may:

  • Share full recordings internally with current members
  • Use short excerpts or clips for marketing or promotional purposes

We will not intentionally use recordings in ways that disclose confidential member information.

10. Termination

We may suspend or terminate your access:

  • With notice and an opportunity to cure when appropriate
  • Immediately, without warning, for egregious or harmful conduct

If terminated for cause, access ends immediately, even if prepaid. Refunds in such cases are discretionary.

11. Disclaimer of Warranties

The Services are provided “as is” and “as available.” We disclaim all warranties, express or implied, including warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.

12. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, CPG Fast Track shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages.

Our total liability shall not exceed the greater of $100 or the fees you paid in the 12 months preceding the claim.

13. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify and hold harmless CPG Fast Track from claims arising out of your use of the Services, violation of these Terms, or infringement of third-party rights.

14. Dispute Resolution & Arbitration

Any dispute arising out of these Terms shall be resolved by binding arbitration, not court, except where prohibited by law.

You agree to:

  • Waive the right to a jury trial
  • Waive participation in class or representative actions

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Ohio, and venue shall lie in Franklin County.

15. Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be communicated by email or notice within the Services. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

16. Contact Information

CPGX, LLC d/b/a CPG Fast Track

Email: hello@cpgfasttrack.com

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.dc:creator: matt
item.content:encoded:
CPGX, LLC d/b/a CPG Fast Track

Effective Date: January 1, 2026

CPGX, LLC, doing business as CPG Fast Track (“CPG Fast Track,” “we,” “us,” or “our”), respects your privacy and is committed to protecting it through this Privacy Policy.

This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your information when you visit our website, join our community, or otherwise interact with our services (collectively, the “Services”).

This Privacy Policy is a stand-alone document but should be read together with our Terms of Service, which govern your use of the Services.

1. Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly to us, information collected automatically, and information from third parties.

Information You Provide to Us

You may provide personal information when you:

  • Visit our website
  • Join the CPG Fast Track membership
  • Create or update a community profile
  • Subscribe to our email newsletter
  • Participate in surveys, forms, polls, or community discussions
  • Contact us for support

This information may include:

  • Name
  • Email address
  • Payment-related information (processed by Stripe; we do not store full payment card details)
  • Community profile information
  • Messages, posts, and other content shared in the community
  • Responses to surveys or forms

Information Collected Automatically

When you use our Services, we may automatically collect:

  • IP address
  • Browser type and device information
  • Pages viewed and actions taken
  • Referral URLs
  • Cookies and similar tracking technologies

Information from Third Parties

We may receive information from third-party services used to operate our business, including:

  • Circle (community hosting and engagement)
  • ConvertKit (email communications)
  • Stripe (payment processing)
  • Analytics and advertising partners (e.g., Meta)

2. Information We Do Not Collect

We do not intentionally collect:

  • Sensitive personal data (such as Social Security numbers or government IDs)
  • Health or medical information
  • Precise geolocation data
  • Personal information from children under the age of 18

Our Services are intended for adults only.

3. How We Use Your Information

We use your information to:

  • Provide, operate, and improve the Services
  • Manage memberships and accounts
  • Process payments and billing
  • Send transactional communications (e.g., account updates, service notices)
  • Send marketing and promotional communications (with opt-out options)
  • Facilitate community participation and engagement
  • Conduct analytics and understand how the Services are used
  • Enforce our Terms of Service and community rules
  • Comply with legal obligations

4. Marketing Communications

Members and subscribers may receive:

  • Transactional emails, such as billing notices, account updates, or important service communications
  • Marketing emails, such as newsletters, announcements, and promotions

All marketing emails include an unsubscribe link. Opting out of marketing communications does not affect your receipt of transactional emails.

5. Cookies & Tracking Technologies

We use cookies and similar technologies to:

  • Analyze site traffic and usage
  • Understand user behavior
  • Support marketing and advertising efforts

We do not currently use a formal cookie-consent banner. You can control cookies through your browser settings, though disabling cookies may affect certain features of the Services.

6. How We Share Information

We may share personal information:

  • With trusted service providers who help us operate the Services (e.g., Circle, Kit, Stripe, analytics tools)
  • With advertising platforms for marketing and remarketing purposes
  • To comply with legal obligations, court orders, or lawful requests
  • In connection with a merger, sale, or transfer of assets

We do not sell personal data to third parties.

7. Community Content & Visibility

Information you share within the CPG Fast Track community (such as posts, comments, or messages) may be visible to other members, depending on the settings and context.

You are responsible for the information you choose to share publicly or semi-publicly within the community.

8. Data Security

We take reasonable administrative, technical, and organizational measures to protect personal information. However, no method of transmission or storage is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

9. Data Retention

We retain personal information only as long as necessary to:

  • Provide the Services
  • Fulfill the purposes described in this Privacy Policy
  • Comply with legal, accounting, or reporting obligations

10. International Users & Privacy Rights

CPG Fast Track is based in the United States and primarily serves U.S.-based users, but international users may access the Services.

Depending on your location, you may have rights to:

  • Access the personal information we hold about you
  • Request correction or deletion of your information
  • Object to or restrict certain processing
  • Withdraw consent where applicable

Requests may be submitted to hello@cpgfasttrack.com. We may need to verify your identity before responding.

11. California Privacy Rights

California residents may have additional rights under applicable state privacy laws, including the right to request information about data collection and sharing practices.

We do not sell personal information as defined under California law.

12. Third-Party Links & Services

Our Services may contain links to third-party websites or services. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those third parties, and this Privacy Policy does not apply to them.

13. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we make material changes, we will update the effective date and provide notice as required by law.

Continued use of the Services after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated Privacy Policy.

14. Contact Us

If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, contact us at:

CPGX, LLC d/b/a CPG Fast Track

Email: hello@cpgfasttrack.com

item.title: Pricing Tiers
item.dc:creator: MarkusK
item.content:encoded:
Pick Your Growth Path

Community

$29

/

month

Like-minded founders, expert insights, and exclusive resources that get your CPG brand in gear.

No revenue requirements

Apply Now

As a Community member, you’ll get:

  • Private community access with vetted CPG founders
  • Peer-to-peer DMs (no noise, no spam)
  • Access to resource library
  • Expert fireside chat recordings
  • Monthly Live Office Hours

Most Popular

Growth

Starting at $249

/

month

Bi-weekly peer roundtables. Live expert firesides. Real connection, camaraderie, and coaching to accelerate your personal and professional growth.

For 6-7 figure brands

Apply Now

Everything in Community, plus:

  • Bi-weekly 90min facilitated small groups with founders at a similar stage, facilitated by a seasoned CPG coach.
  • Interactive fireside chats with experienced operators
  • Ongoing Office Hours with the CPG Fast Track team
  • Structured cadence to keep you accountable
  • Risk-free 90-day guarantee

Partner

Starting at $1199

/

month

Custom engagement built specifically for your business. Our most hands-on track. Exclusively for founders we deeply believe in. Limited seats.

For 7-8 figure brands

Apply Now

Everything in Growth, plus:

  • Customized approach tailored for founders’ needs
  • 1:1 coaching with CPG Fast Track founders
  • Additional seat for co-founder
  • On-demand access for high-leverage decisions
  • Strategic support across growth, finance, and execution

item.title: HP3 - Member success
item.dc:creator: MarkusK
item.content:encoded:
Not 1,000 Members. Just the Right Ones.

Small by design. Big on results. Every operator gets personalized coaching, curated peer circles, and real relationships that actually drive progress.

Personal Care Brand

From $500K → $15M in under a year.

Hot Beverage Brand

From winding down the business → Award-winning rebrand.

Supplement Brand

From limited retail → National Walmart rollout.

Supplement Brand

From $0 paid media → $30K/month & profitable in 3 months.


And We Don’t Take Equity.

item.title: HP4 - Coaching
item.dc:creator: MarkusK
item.content:encoded:
How Our Coaching Works


1:1 Expert Coaching

Get direct guidance from operators who’ve scaled real CPG brands. Bring your toughest challenge—whether retail, supply chain, or ads—and get answers from someone who’s done it before.

Biweekly Growth Circles

6–8 CPG founders from non-competing brands, carefully matched and guided by a facilitator. A space to pressure-test ideas, swap lessons, and push your business forward.

Peer Matching

Skip the awkward networking. We connect you with founders at your stage who can share what’s working (and what isn’t) in real time.

Private Community

A vetted circle of ambitious CPG builders. Tap into quick advice, trusted vendor recs, or just founders who get the grind.

+30 yrs

CPG experience

|

+300M

CPG Customers

|

+500

Employees hired

|

+$100M

Funding raised

item.title: HP6 - Meet Coaches
item.dc:creator: MarkusK
item.content:encoded:
Meet Your Coaches

You'll get to know your coaches like you would an executive coach - and they'll get to know you. Plus, this is just the tip of the spear.

Lisa Barnett

Co-Founder, Frmr President & CMO, Little Spoon

Specialties: Strategy, Marketing, Branding, Team

Accolades: Inc 5000 Awardee, Women Changing the Food Industry by Well + Good, Time's Best Invention of the Year, CircleUp Most Innovative Consumer and Retail Brand, Forbes 30 Under 30 Venture Capital.

Dave Colina

Founder & CEO, O2 Hydration

Specialties: Leadership, Sales, Partnerships, Marketing

Accolades: Inc 5000 Awardee, a certified CrossFit coach & Krav Maga black belt, and winner of the 2020 Best Beverage Marketing Campaign of the Year.

Markus Karjalainen

Frmr CMO, Founding team, Four Sigmatic

Specialties: Ecommerce, Brand Marketing

Accolades: DTC-first marketer, widely recognized as pioneering adaptogens in the United States, including top-selling coffee products on Amazon.

item.dc:creator: MarkusK
item.content:encoded:
Are We A Strong Fit?

This is an active, highly-vetted network of CPG leaders building the next generation of global brands by combining the power of community, insights, and access.

Apply Today

Beyond proof of product, but haven't yet scaled into multiple millions

Founder, co-founder, or majority owner

Under ~10 employees

Premium "better for you" products currently in the market

Focus on growth and route to profitability

Apply Today
